summary: Iter47 PropOS rebrand + Dashboard/Portfolio/Invest upgrades verified end-to-end via Playwright on the public preview URL. All 7 review-request features PASS. No regressions in /invest/asset/demo or /invest URL-paste recovery flow.
critical_code_review_comments: Rebrand grep across /app/frontend/src for 'STAYOS|Stayos|VELA|Vela' (excluding intentional internal identifiers vela-invest / vela-operate / EnterVela / WhyVela / vela-nav / vela-footer / mobile-nav-enter-vela) returns zero matches — rebrand is clean in user-visible surfaces.
DashboardHome.jsx KPI strip is now 5-wide (md:grid-cols-5) with dashboard-kpi-needs-data='Assets Needing Data · 1 · Block full analysis' wired to a brand-honest copy.
DashboardHome.jsx Market Pulse Source Ledger correctly marks Airbnb/Booking/Spitogatos as USED and AirDNA/PriceLabs/PMS as NOT CONNECTED — no fabricated integrations.

Portfolio.jsx _computeRow derives movement from opportunity_strength only when has_intelligence; otherwise emits 'Needs Data' — strictly honest. All 5 demo assets correctly render the 'Needs Data' MovementStrip.

Portfolio.jsx 'portfolio-section-changes' renders only when filtered.length>0 and shows an honest empty state ('No verified changes yet' + 'Tracking activates once a PMS / channel manager is connected').

InvestLanding.jsx Live Demo section (invest-demo-section / invest-demo-card / invest-demo-badge='DEMO DATA') is below the URL paste card with the Run Demo Analysis CTA navigating to /invest/asset/demo — verified live.
Footer.jsx outputs '© 2026 PropOS — The AI Operating System for Hospitality Real Estate.' as required.
index.html <title> = 'PropOS — The Operating System for Hospitality Assets' — matches spec exactly.
context_for_next_testing_agent:
VERIFIED LIVE on https://hospitality-ai-12.preview.emergentagent.com:
  (1) Browser tab title = 'PropOS — The Operating System for Hospitality Assets'. Nav logo data-testid='nav-logo' = 'PropOS.'. No VELA/Stayos remnants in body text on /, /dashboard/demo, /portfolio/demo, /invest, /invest/asset/demo.
  (2) /dashboard/demo: data-testid='dashboard-kpis' contains all 5 KPIs (dashboard-kpi-assets='3', dashboard-kpi-opps='5', dashboard-kpi-gap='€42k', dashboard-kpi-needs-data='Assets Needing Data · 1', dashboard-kpi-reports='4').
  (3) /dashboard/demo: dashboard-section-watchlist renders 3 cards — dashboard-watch-plaka-3br (decision=NEGOTIATE, €485,000), dashboard-watch-pagrati-loft (decision=BUY, €225,000), dashboard-watch-monastiraki-walkup (decision=NEEDS DATA, €168,000). Each card has an Open Deal button (dashboard-watch-{id}-open).
  (4) /dashboard/demo: dashboard-section-market-pulse renders market-pulse-signals (STR demand UP / ADR direction STABLE / Occupancy direction UP / Comparable listings STABLE; all labelled Medium) and market-pulse-sources (Airbnb=USED, Booking=USED, Spitogatos=USED, AirDNA=NOT CONNECTED, PriceLabs=NOT CONNECTED, PMS=NOT CONNECTED).
  (5) /portfolio/demo: 5 portfolio cards rendered (cycladic-boutique-suite, paros-courtyard, mykonos-villa, athens-loft, comporta-cabin). Every card has portfolio-card-{id}-movement strip; all 5 demo properties (no intelligence) correctly display 'NEEDS DATA' label. portfolio-section-changes renders title 'Portfolio Changes', subtitle 'Verified asset movement only — PropOS never invents trends.', empty state 'NO VERIFIED CHANGES YET' + 'Tracking activates once a PMS / channel manager is connected'.
  (6) /invest: invest-demo-section + invest-demo-card present. invest-demo-badge='DEMO DATA'. Card content verified: 'Koukaki 3BR STR Apartment', '€485,000', '92 m²', '3', '2', 'Koukaki', 'Demo listing'. invest-demo-run-btn navigates to /invest/asset/demo (verified live).
  (7) /invest URL paste with Spitogatos URL navigates to /invest/asset/dft_xxxxxxxx and renders data-testid='listing-unreadable-screen' with all 4 recovery paths (Retry extraction / Paste listing text / Upload screenshots / Enter manually) — no regression.
  Footer = 'PropOS | AI Operating System for Hospitality Real Estate — Asset module. | © 2026 PropOS — The AI Operating System for Hospitality Real Estate.'
  Console errors observed: only HTTP 401s on /api/auth/me (expected — no user logged in for public demo flows). No other errors.
rca of the issue: N/A — no production bugs found. Rebrand and feature additions are wired correctly per spec; no fabricated metrics surface anywhere; honest empty/'Needs Data' states fire where expected.
